prompt: A comic book panel ending: display the phrase 'TO BE CONTINUED...' in bold, classic comic book lettering. The text should have a bright white fill and a thick, dynamic red outline, slightly skewed as if part of an action scene. The background includes a subtle halftone dot pattern and faded visual elements hinting at the end of a dramatic story arc.
prompt_refined: Generate a comic book panel. The phrase 'TO BE CONTINUED...' is prominently displayed in the center, rendered in bold, classic comic book lettering. The text features a bright white fill with a thick, dynamic red outline, slightly skewed to suggest motion or action. The background behind the text exhibits a subtle halftone dot pattern and faded, atmospheric visual elements, hinting at the conclusion of a dramatic storyline.
objects: visual elements hinting at a dramatic storyline conclusion
